generationSteps.3: Building core asset templates and scripts...

management.buildingHint: Generating structured assets using deep simulation LLM engine

expert-creator.name: Expert Creator
expert-creator.description: Intelligently generate new design experts with complete profiles, skill guides, templates, and scripts.

api-design.name: API Design Expert
api-design.description: Design public and internal API contracts, request-response models, and error specifications.

architecture-mapping.name: Architecture Mapping Expert
architecture-mapping.description: Map module boundaries, dependencies, and architecture-level collaboration paths.

config-design.name: Configuration Design Expert
config-design.description: Define runtime configuration, switches, environment strategy, and config governance.

data-design.name: Data Design Expert
data-design.description: Model schemas, migration plans, and persistence structures for business data.

ddd-structure.name: DDD Structure Expert
ddd-structure.description: Shape domain boundaries, aggregates, and domain model structures.

design-assembler.name: Design Assembly Expert
design-assembler.description: Assemble outputs from all experts into a cohesive design package.

flow-design.name: Flow Design Expert
flow-design.description: Design sequence flows, state transitions, and key business interactions.

integration-design.name: Integration Design Expert
integration-design.description: Plan service integration contracts, async events, and coordination mechanisms.

ops-design.name: Ops Design Expert
ops-design.description: Prepare SLOs, observability, alerting, and operational readiness assets.

test-design.name: Test Design Expert
test-design.description: Define test coverage strategy, case inputs, and quality verification structure.

validator.name: Validation Expert
validator.description: Validate design consistency, completeness, and quality gate outcomes.

pipeline.expertsWaiting: Design experts are waiting to load...
